eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Las Animas, CO; at 03:09 PM ON MAY 11, 2026 Effective until 11:09 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Reminder: Scheduled power outage on 5-12-26 starting at 5:00 pm, lasting approximately 10 hours.
For emergencies, please call 911. Thank you for your patience. On behalf of the City of Trinidad
